blockingIssues.description: GET /api/actions currently returns bare actions rows without joined contact fields, but the wired Actions page consumes ActionCard fields (contactName/contactCompany/contactEmail), creating an API/UI contract mismatch.

The required component-test migration to mock useActions and verify ActionsPage dismiss/snooze wiring was not implemented; tests remain focused on apiRequest patterns and mock-data assertions instead of page-hook integration.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce stricter evidence requirements in skill feedback: if required manual agent-browser checks are skipped or TDD order is not followed, handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure should not be marked true.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of feature phase2-wire-ui-to-api found no agent-browser execution and tests were not written first, while handoff still reported followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit contract-alignment rule for integration milestones: endpoint response shapes used by UI hooks/tests must be consistent across validation-contract assertions and shared typed models.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: validation-contract describes useActions returning Action[] while shared/types/actions.ts defines ActionCard with required contact identity fields, masking the missing join in /api/actions.
